name: Beacon Credit Union, Incorporated
description_short: Beacon Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving central Virginia with multiple branches, offering checking, savings, and lending products to qualified members.
description_long:
Beacon Credit Union, Incorporated is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration). The organization operates multiple branch locations across central Virginia, including Lynchburg, Danville, Roanoke, Bedford, Buena Vista, and Madison Heights, with a corporate office and service center supporting member services. The credit union requires a $5 membership share for eligibility and provides standard financial products and services typical of federally-insured credit unions.

Beacon Credit Union offers a range of financial services including online banking, deposit accounts (share accounts and share certificates), and lending products. Members can access services through multiple physical branch locations with extended hours including Saturday lobby service at several locations, drive-through ATM access, phone banking at 434-237-1566, and digital banking through their online portal. The organization maintains an NMLS ID (#514359) and operates under federal credit union regulations.

The credit union distinguishes itself through geographic accessibility with 10 named branch locations across a multi-county service area in central Virginia. The organization provides traditional credit union member benefits including potentially more favorable rates on deposits and loans compared to for-profit banks, member ownership structure, and community-focused operations. Saturday lobby hours at the Logans Lane branch provide weekend accessibility that many traditional banks do not offer.

As a credit union, Beacon is subject to the same regulatory oversight as other NCUA-insured institutions. The website provides limited detail regarding specific loan products, rates, fees, or competitive advantages. Prospective members should contact the credit union directly to understand membership eligibility requirements, product offerings, current rates, and how their services compare to local banking alternatives. The $5 membership requirement and potential field of membership restrictions are standard credit union practices but should be verified before applying.
services: Online banking with account access and management
Lending products (specific types not detailed on website)
Multiple ATM locations across service area
Bill payment services (standard credit union offering)
pros: NCUA-insured member deposits providing federal insurance protection up to standard limits
Multiple branch locations (10 named branches) across central Virginia for in-person access
Saturday lobby hours (9am-1pm) at Logans Lane branch providing weekend banking access
Drive-through service available at multiple locations with extended weekday hours (until 6pm Friday)
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure potentially offering better rates than for-profit banks
Online banking portal for remote account access and management
Phone banking available at 434-237-1566 and email support at mybcu@mybcu.org
cons: $5 membership share requirement and potential field of membership eligibility restrictions not fully detailed on website
Limited transparency on specific loan products, interest rates, APRs, and fees available on the public website
Website provides minimal detail on credit union's full service offerings, competitive advantages, or membership requirements
No information provided about loan approval timelines, specific lending criteria, or product features
best_for: Central Virginia residents seeking NCUA-insured deposit accounts with local branch access
Community members eligible for credit union membership who value member-owned financial institutions
Consumers preferring weekend banking hours and multiple physical branch locations
diagnosis: Beacon Credit Union is best for central Virginia residents who are eligible for membership and seek the stability of an NCUA-insured, member-owned financial institution with convenient branch access. The primary caveat is that the public website provides limited detail about specific products, rates, and services—prospective members must contact the credit union directly to compare offerings with local banks and confirm membership eligibility.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Beacon Credit Union, Incorporated — NCUA-insured credit union in Lynchburg, VA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
